data.title: $100M acquisition: MoonPay buys Sodot for institutional crypto expansion, forming new unit led by ex-CFTC Chair Pham.
data.description: MoonPay has recently finalized its acquisition of Sodot, a crypto security infrastructure provider based in Israel. This strategic move is set to pave the way for MoonPay's establishment of a new institutional division, which will be overseen by Caroline Pham, the former Acting Chair of CFTC. With this development, MoonPay aims to bolster its capabilities in serving institutional clients.

data.title: A New Culinary Icon Rises Above Pensacola: Michelin-Starred Chef Akira Back to Debut Namesake, Akira Back Rooftop Restaurant at Reverb by Hard Rock
data.description: Renowned chef Akira Back, who holds Michelin stars, is scheduled to launch his new restaurant, Namesake, at Reverb by Hard Rock Pensacola in 2029.

data.title: Prediction market volume soars to $25.7B monthly with increase in user engagement beyond one-time events.
data.description: A recent study conducted by Bitget Wallet and Polymarket revealed that retail users are increasingly involved in prediction markets, with a focus on sustained engagement rather than one-time wagers. This trend highlights a shift towards ongoing participation, indicating a growing interest in the market.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Therabody/
data.description: Therabody has recently announced the appointment of Dr. Dhaval Bhanusali as Chief Dermatologist on April 29, 2026. This decision reflects their dedication to advancing science-backed innovation. The news was shared via a press release distributed by Therabody on PR Newswire. The statement includes the addition of a hyperlink to the sixth section of the release for further information.

data.title: Peraton Achieves CMMC Final Level 2, Reinforcing Commitment to Secure, Uninterrupted Mission Support
data.description: Peraton, based in Reston, Virginia, has attained Final Level 2 certification under the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification (CMMC) program. This accomplishment follows a positive evaluation by a CMMC Certified Third-Party Assessment Organization. The certification highlights Peraton's dedication to providing top-tier cybersecurity practices for its clients. The CMMC program, created by the Department of War (DoW), sets demanding cybersecurity criteria for safeguarding sensitive data. This achievement signifies Peraton's commitment to ensuring cybersecurity excellence.

data.title: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Zimmer Biomet Following Q1 Results
data.description: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ZBH) announced strong first-quarter earnings as of Tuesday. The company's adjusted earnings for the quarter were $2.09 per share, marking a 15.5% increase from the previous year and surpassing the Street's forecast of $1.86 per share. Sales for the period reached $2.087 billion, indicating a 9.3% rise on a reported basis, a 6.8% increase on a constant currency basis, and a 2.9% uptick on an organic constant currency basis, exceeding expectations of $2.07 billion in sales. Zimmer Biomet's Chairman, President, and CEO, Ivan Tornos, stated, "We are off to a solid start to the year — strategically, operationally, and financially." The company also adjusted its fiscal earnings guidance from the initial range of $8.30-$8.45 per share to $8.40-$8.55 per share, compared to the consensus of $8.40 per share.

data.title: Edge Data Center Market to Surpass USD 62 Bn by 2031 with BFSI End-User Segment Holding 28.85% Share in 2025, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India on April 29, 2026, a recent study by Mordor Intelligence revealed that the edge data center sector is experiencing significant growth. This growth is propelled by the rising need for real-time data processing and the growing demand for low-latency infrastructure. The market for edge data centers is expanding rapidly, driven by these factors.

data.title: Animal Rescue Corps partners with National Mill Dog Rescue to save more than 60 dogs from commercial breeders
data.description: A group of dogs were moved from Missouri to the Animal Rescue Corps (ARC) center in Nashville, Tennessee on April 29, 2026. ARC, a nonprofit dedicated to animal protection, worked with the National Mill Dog Rescue (NMDR) to provide medical treatment, rehabilitation, and new homes for these dogs. The exact number of dogs and their specific conditions were not mentioned in the report. This effort showcased the collaboration between the two organizations to help animals in need.

data.title: BCEN Announces 2026 Distinguished Awards Honoring Top Board-Certified Emergency, Trauma, Transport and Burn Nurses
data.description: In Oak Brook, Illinois, on April 29, 2026, the Board of Certification for Emergency Nursing (BCEN) revealed the recipients of the 2026 National Awards honoring registered nurses (RNs) for their exceptional clinical skills, professionalism, and advocacy within the emergency nursing field. BCEN, renowned for its specialized certifications in emergency care, recognized these outstanding RNs who excel in providing critical medical care. This event highlights the commitment and dedication of these nurses in delivering high-quality healthcare services.

data.title: Statement from the National Press Club on Pentagon press restrictions
data.description: In a recent development on April 29, 2026, the President of the National Press Club, Mark Schoeff Jr., responded to the appeals court decision permitting the Defense Department to uphold restrictions on Pentagon coverage. Schoeff expressed the organization's concerns about this ruling. This decision impacts how reporters can cover Pentagon-related news, which raises questions about transparency and press freedom. The National Press Club emphasizes the importance of unrestricted access for reporters, highlighting the need for transparency in government actions.

data.title: Call for Global Entries: Globee® Awards for Leadership Invite Nominations for Leadership Achievements at Local, Regional, and Global Levels
data.description: Honoring outstanding leadership in various sectors at local, regional, and global levels, the Globee® Awards have gathered participants from around the world. The prestigious awards program, known for its data-driven approach, commends exceptional achievements in business. The event took place in San Francisco on April 29, 2026.

data.title: Fig Factor Media Announces Launch of "Latinas in Construction Vol. II"
data.description: Renowned real estate broker and author Tina Marie Hernandez, based in Santa Ana, California, has recently unveiled the latest installment of her successful series, Latinas in Construction Vol. II. Released on April 29, 2026, this edition showcases a collection of inspiring stories. Tina Marie Hernandez, a recipient of multiple awards in the real estate industry, continues to make her mark with this new release.

data.title: Robinhood, SoFi Stocks Sink After Earnings As Fintech Investors Punish Misses
data.description: Robinhood Markets Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD) and SoFi Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI) saw a significant decline in their shares on Wednesday following disappointing quarterly results. Investors appeared less lenient towards fintech companies as they scrutinized factors like missed expectations, margin strains, and segment-specific challenges. SOFI stock is plummeting as per the latest chart and price developments. HOOD shares plunged by 12.25% to $72.02 after reporting Q1 revenue at $1.07 billion, falling short of the expected $1.14 billion. Earnings stood at 38 cents per share, below the estimated 40 cents. Despite Robinhood's 15% year-over-year revenue growth, $346 million net income, and $17.7 billion... More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bryant & Stratton College Opens New Richmond - Chesterfield Campus to Expand Healthcare Workforce Pipeline
data.description: In North Chesterfield, Virginia, Bryant & Stratton College has inaugurated its newly relocated Richmond - Chesterfield Campus. The expansive 53,000-square-foot facility located at 101 Gateway Centre Parkway, Suite 210 aims to provide career-focused education and meet the rising need for healthcare workers in Central Virginia. The campus will house hundreds of aspiring healthcare professionals and enhance access to education in the region.
